_doc: Mystery Booster 2 (MB2, 2024-08-02) — official 14-card + playtest structure from Wizards' 'What's Inside Mystery Booster 2'. Single product → authoritative:true. POOL SPLIT: the normal common/uncommon/rare slots draw from the set code 'mb2norm' — a pre-baked pool of the real ~1,835-card MB2 reprint list (built by scripts/build-mb2-pool.mjs from the community 'MB2 full card list for digital draft' on Moxfield, since Scryfall's own set:mb2 holds ONLY the ~385 special treatments). The Future Sight / white-bordered / playtest slots draw from the live Scryfall 'mb2' set, which has those exact treatments (future_frame / white_border / playtest_card filters). Future Sight slot includes the ~5% traditional-foil chase. If data/set-cards/mb2norm.json.gz is missing, regenerate it with `node scripts/build-mb2-pool.mjs`.

draft.tagline: 14 cards + 1 playtest · ~11 commons/uncommons · 1 rare/mythic · Future Sight frame (foil chase) · white-bordered reprint
